# FinTrackr

> An intelligent money control center built for Indian salary life — track UPI spends, set monthly safe limits, plan EMIs, and beat month-end stress.

FinTrackr helps salaried users in India see exactly where their money goes between paydays. It combines SMS/UPI intelligence, smart categorization, salary-aware budgeting, goal planning, and a "Can I buy this?" gut-check to keep spending under control.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how FinTrackr helps you survive till next salary.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing users sign in to FinTrackr.
- [Create account](/signup): Sign up for a new FinTrackr account.
- [Get started](/onboarding): Guided setup — pick goals, set salary date, and configure preferences.

## Optional

- [Reset password](/forgot-password): Request a password reset email.
